requiredCI: callback response field substitution and Gateway challenge replay/expiry rejection
Product Session proof signature, method, signed product path, exact body digest and persistent replay rejection
callbackTransport: Use @ynx-chain/wallet-auth createCallbackURL/parseCallbackURL exactly. After the Wallet approval callback, issue a short-lived Gateway challenge; require the exact product P-256 device key to sign it; complete with authorizationRequest, walletApproval and gatewayCompletion.
productSessionProof: Reject bearer/device session headers. Parse X-YNX-Product-Session-Proof and use CanonicalWalletGatewayAdapter.introspect with method, exact body digest and X-YNX-Product-Request-Path. Treat that path header as untrusted until signature verification, and reject unless a fixed route table maps it to the active /app/<product>/* endpoint. Consume each proof once.
rollout: Publish v2 registry entries, challenge/completion routes and verifier routes in one transaction. Until both health checks pass, products remain integratedCentral=false and adapters return unavailable without local substitution.
